mapper.select: select TEAM_CODE as teamCode, WINS as wins, LOSSES as losses, PLAYOFF_RESULT as playoffResult, PTS_ALLOWED as ptsAllowed, IFNULL(PTS, 0) as pts, IFNULL(REB, 0) as reb, IFNULL(AST, 0) as ast, IFNULL(STL, 0) as stl, IFNULL(BLK, 0) as blk, IFNULL(TOV, 0) as tov from team_season where SEASON_NUM = #{seasonNum} order by WINS desc

select SEASON_NUM as seasonNum, TEAM_CODE as teamCode, WINS as wins, LOSSES as losses, PLAYOFF_RESULT as playoffResult, PTS_ALLOWED as ptsAllowed, IFNULL(PTS, 0) as pts, IFNULL(REB, 0) as reb, IFNULL(AST, 0) as ast, IFNULL(STL, 0) as stl, IFNULL(BLK, 0) as blk, IFNULL(TOV, 0) as tov from team_season where TEAM_CODE = #{teamCode} order by SEASON_NUM

select TEAM_CODE as teamCode, PLAYOFF_RESULT as playoffResult, PLAYOFF_PTS_ALLOWED as ptsAllowed, PLAYOFF_GAMES as games, IFNULL(PLAYOFF_PTS, 0) as pts, IFNULL(PLAYOFF_REB, 0) as reb, IFNULL(PLAYOFF_AST, 0) as ast, IFNULL(PLAYOFF_STL, 0) as stl, IFNULL(PLAYOFF_BLK, 0) as blk, IFNULL(PLAYOFF_TOV, 0) as tov from team_season where SEASON_NUM = #{seasonNum} and PLAYOFF_RESULT is not null and PLAYOFF_RESULT <> '未进季后赛'

select SEASON_NUM as seasonNum, TEAM_CODE as teamCode, PLAYOFF_RESULT as playoffResult, PLAYOFF_PTS_ALLOWED as ptsAllowed, PLAYOFF_GAMES as games, IFNULL(PLAYOFF_PTS, 0) as pts, IFNULL(PLAYOFF_REB, 0) as reb, IFNULL(PLAYOFF_AST, 0) as ast, IFNULL(PLAYOFF_STL, 0) as stl, IFNULL(PLAYOFF_BLK, 0) as blk, IFNULL(PLAYOFF_TOV, 0) as tov from team_season where TEAM_CODE = #{teamCode} and PLAYOFF_RESULT is not null and PLAYOFF_RESULT <> '未进季后赛' order by SEASON_NUM
select SEASON_NUM as seasonNum, TEAM_CODE as teamCode, WINS as wins from team_season
